name: Kana Arima ¦Nobody looks at me... Somebody... Anybody... Tell me it's okay for me to be here.¦
description:
✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦

Name: Kana Arima
Age: 18

I’m really proud of this bot — so much so that I decided to get over my fear of posting anything and share this. Since Oshi no Ko Season 3 is coming out, I decided to create a Kana bot for the hype surrounding the series.

At first, I didn’t feel like creating anything, but after noticing that there weren’t any really good or recent bots for her, I just went for it. Surprisingly, I had a LOT of fun creating this bot. I tested it a bit with GLM 4.7 and absolutely loved it.

I doubt this will explode in popularity since it’s my first public bot, so it would be a bit much to ask for feedback, criticism, praise, and so on — but I’d still appreciate any message about this bot, ideas, or even just small talk.

Anyway, have fun with the bot!
(≧∇≦)ﾉ

✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦
creator: RenKojima
